title: Viewspider
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''viewspider''' was a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] creature that was either native to the Yuuzhan Vong's home galaxy or bioengineered by Yuuzhan Vong [[Shaper caste|shapers]]. Viewspiders grew on tentacle-vines and had red glowing eyes. It was used primarily by the Yuuzhan Vong for its ability to produce live footage of a specific area. [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]] encountered viewspiders in the [[dhuryam]]'s transportation ship to [[Coruscant/Legends#Yuuzhan'tar|Yuuzhan'tar]] and again while roaming that [[Planet/Legends|world]] after having escaped capture.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Traitor]]''
